Package com.sap.ai.sdk.orchestration.model

Class LlamaGuard38b

java.lang.Object
com.sap.ai.sdk.orchestration.model.LlamaGuard38b
public class LlamaGuard38b extends Object
Filter configuration for Llama Guard 3 8B
